text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several weeks have passed since I began watching over Mihono
Bourbon's secret training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant.
choice_data_list: Hang in there! Just a bit more to go!
Hang in there! Just a bit more to go!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Haaah... New personal... best!
choice_data_list: You did a great job!
You did a great job!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your support. Upon full recovery of stamina, I will
transition to the interval training workout. Now moving to the ramped
track.
choice_data_list: Let's add an extra lap starting today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Adjusting plan to include modifications.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Stamina recharged. Commencing ramped dash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon races off without another word. Despite the
strenuous training, she never reveals any hint of weakness.
choice_data_list:
(From a trainer's perspective, there's no doubt
that she's more naturally suited to sprint
distances. And yet...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Witnessing the strength and tenacity in her run, a sense of pride wells
up inside of me.
choice_data_list: (Chase your dreams, Mihono Bourbon!)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's only a matter of time before she's ready for medium and long
distances... Only one obstacle remains.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
So you're the one who's been giving her endurance lessons behind my
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, the changes in Mihono Bourbon's condition catch her
trainer's eye. After putting two and two together, he calls me out.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This person is not involved with my evening runs. I have been doing
everything by my own will.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon, you really think I'm going to believe that when you two
have been meeting every night? I bet this trainer took pity on you.
choice_data_list: What? It's not like that...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Listen, I've heard all about her lofty goals. But you and me both, we
know the risks involved. Do you really think I'm going to let her run
those races?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If I may object, my entire purpose for enrolling here is the Triple
Crown. I will not accept anything less.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Exasperated by her stubbornness, the trainer lets out a long sigh.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...Fine. Then show me if you've got what it takes. The Kikuka Sho is
3,000 meters. Let's see you run that distance right now.
choice_data_list: (She can't handle that kind of distance yet!)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will prove my abilities to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We move to the course for Mihono Bourbon's 3,000-meter attempt. However, at her current level, I'm not sure she can finish, let alone finish fast.
choice_data_list: (I hope she'll be okay...)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(1,600 meters completed on time. 1,400 meters remain. Irregular air
intake detected. Unable to maintain a steady pace...)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My gut was right. Around the 2,000 meter mark, Mihono Bourbon's
speed starts decreasing. It's all but a crawl by the time she reaches
the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Just give up already. Stop doing this to yourself. You're not built for
long distances.
choice_data_list:
(It's true that long-distance races aren't her
forte. But still...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending several weeks with Mihono Bourbon, anyone can see
how determined she is to participate in the Classic Triple Crown
series.
choice_data_list: I think we should respect her wishes.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Can't you see that all she's doing is hurting herself? Why is it so hard
for you to understand?
choice_data_list: But—

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Ugh never mind, there's no point in talking to you. Bourbon, tell us
how you feel. I'm sure you understood the reality of the situation
when you were running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: How I "feel"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A hesitant Mihono Bourbon opens her mouth to speak.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...The Triple Crown is non-negotiable. This is one objective I must see
to the end.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Please understand that I cannot give up now.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...If that's what you want, then so be it. I can't stand by your decision
in good faith. Our training contract ends today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...
...I understand.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...I had high expectations of you, Bourbon. You've disappointed me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shaking his head, the trainer turns on his heels and leaves.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: ...Hey, are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I am currently experiencing "confusion" due to the loss of my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is true that despite my supplementary training, I was unable to run
3,000 meters.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I've based all my projections upon the Triple Crown. Have I been
miscalculating my whole racing career?
choice_data_list:
I have faith in you. You have what it takes to
succeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her perseverance to put herself through such demanding training
without a single complaint is no small feat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather, it's a testament to Mihono Bourbon's willpower and her desire
to achieve the Classic Triple Crown.
choice_data_list:
No matter what other people say, I'm on your
side!

No matter what other people say, I'm on your
side!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: We'll get to the finish line together.
We'll get to the finish line together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mihono Bourbon's eyes widen.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Together...
choice_data_list: I don't want you to give up.
I don't want you to give up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: (These words... sound familiar...)

text_block_list.name: Young Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Haaah... nngh... Father... I failed... again...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
You may not have a lot of stamina. But what you've got is the heart to
keep going. As long as you don't stop, everything's gonna be all
right.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text: We'll get to the finish line together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: (This trainer sounds just like my father.)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: ...Mihono Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to bear the awkward silence any longer, I grab her attention.
She studies my face for a moment before speaking.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your customized training plan allowed me to achieve the first 1,600
meters today, which is more than I could manage before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I feel that I will go far with you as my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: From now on, I am in your care.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then, the so-called "cyborg" of Tracen Academy grips my hand
firmly—but warmly.
